violations.text: Utensils were observed stored in stagnant water between uses. Utensils were moved at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/15/2025
The door to the kitchen toilet room is not self-closing. Toilet room doors must be self-closing. New Violation. Correct By: 07/22/2025

The sink used for food preparation is lacking an air gap. A direct connection must not exist between the sewage system and a drain originating from equipment in which food is placed. Establishment is to install an air gap. New Violation. Correct By: 11/21/2024
